channel.title: denby.design Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on UX, digital design, tech trends, and more from Denby Serrao-Arnot.

item.title: The Road to AI Dorado
item.description: Prompt-to-UI, design-to-code, MCP, Figma Make, and why the real prize might be a code-native design canvas where the product is already alive.
